title: Gaymers Hub Pack
description: A Pack meant to emulate the feeling of modded beta Minecraft
body:
The Gaymers Hub Pack is ment to provide the feel of the old beta modding scene. with a few aditions such as the ather and toms simple storage not to add to much while keeping the same feel of beta. The mod pack runs 1.21.1 so it also includes most modern fetures while having rebalanced changes such as a over hauled enchanting system (thanks to Better enchanting) to better match the progression of beta. The pack is also optimized using some of the best performance mods avalible such as sodium and lithum to name 2. The mod pack also comes included with overhauled terrain genration using the modern beta mod. 

The pack is mostly ment for the Gaymers hub server but feel free to use it on your own


Credit to Bbbali for some of the extra programmer art textures included in the pack
